name: Golden Days
overview: The store is located in today's Belgrade and follows a young couple who, after failed marriages and after only 48 hours of acquaintance, start creating a family. Both from previous marriages and just when they start living together, numerous families, neighbors and friends enter their lives, who with their problems, emotions and adventures show that life always has its witty side. It is this humor that makes this story honest, healing and interesting.

trailers.title: Nova serija na SUPERSTARTV | ZLATNI DANI | Zvanični trejler 🎬
